name: ♊ Gemini
subtitle: Full Correspondences
flowText: Gemini is the twin current — air of thought, spark of words, mirror of duality.

related.name: ☿ Mercury
related.teaser: Mercury is the quicksilver axis — trickster of thought, breath of inspiration, messenger between…

related.name: NUMBERS
related.teaser: Monad is the point before all division — the radiant seed, the single flame from which the ten thousand things unfold.

related.name: Zephyrus
related.teaser: Heart is the vesica of the world — the overlap where differences become devotion.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: Hermes
related.teaser: Hermes guide of souls — quicksilver tongue that bridges worlds.

related.name: ᚨ Ansuz
related.teaser: Ansuz is the bright breath — the word that arrives with wings.

related.name: I. The Magician
related.teaser: The Magician raises hand to heaven and points to earth, the voice of creation flowing through the…

related.name: Three of Swords
related.teaser: Three of Swords is the blade of air — Creation takes shape; teamwork with the element.

related.name: 0. The Fool
related.teaser: The Fool is the zero-breath, seed of all paths — step into the abyss, carried by trust in the…

related.name: Five of Swords
related.teaser: Five of Swords is the blade of air — Friction reveals truth; growth through test.

related.name: Six of Swords
related.teaser: Six of Swords is the blade of air — Reciprocity and grace; the current flows.

related.name: Ten of Swords
related.teaser: Ten of Swords is the blade of air — Completion and consequence; passing the mantle.
